name: Mandiant
description: Mandiant — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers. Specializes in Threat Intelligence.

seo.title: Mandiant Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Mandiant analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

review.verdict: Mandiant is a Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security checks
cons: False positives require ongoing developer triage time
review.best_for: Dev teams needing SAST, DAST, or SCA in the pipeline
review.not_for: Projects with no regulatory or security compliance needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
